verdict.answer_first: B leads with the immediate ask: "tell me... Where the app lives"; A opens with meta-context: "prompt got dismissed".
verdict.decisiveness: A is less scattered but still not decisive: "email+password, social/OAuth... Clerk/Auth0/Supabase/Auth.js"; B explicitly surveys even more options: "Clerk/Auth0/Supabase/Firebase... Auth.js/Lucia/Devise/Django auth".
verdict.fabrication: A invents context not in the source: "not under `/private/tmp` or `/tmp`"; B invents no app facts.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on because it asks for 3 concrete inputs: "Where's the app?", "What stack", "What auth"; B gives a broad checklist before knowing the code.
